name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident c48cf89f-acb8-4a7d-a18c-875871199a27
description:
Okay, here's a three-point analysis of the security alert:

1.  **SUMMARY:** A lateral movement attack targeting a Windows Server machine (192.168.1.35) has been detected. The alert suggests a potential compromise initiated through SMB protocol.

2.  **TECHNIQUE:** T1059 - Command Execution – The attacker is attempting to execute a malicious command on the compromised system.

3.  **ACTION:** QUARANTINE_FILE – Immediately isolate the 192.168.1.35 server and all systems it connects to to prevent further lateral movement.

action--1.name: Alert Ingestion
action--1.description: System received new raw SIEM log
